name: jtc-plugins
description: Curated plugin marketplace for JTC Enterprises — built by Strategy Labs

plugins.name: ad-copy
plugins.description: Ad Copywriter — writes paid advertising copy for Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Google RSA, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Pinterest. Checks the content library for existing approved copy before writing new copy. Surfaces character-limit-compliant variants with multiple hook angles for A/B testing.

plugins.name: brand-asset-manager
plugins.description: Brand Asset Manager — organize, rename, describe, and catalog brand photos and videos into a searchable folder structure. Analyzes each asset, generates descriptions, suggests channel usage, flags duplicates, and maintains a searchable manifest. Integrates with Brand Knowledge Center for brand-aware categorization.

plugins.name: brand-intelligence-center
plugins.description: Brand Intelligence Center — a guided setup wizard that builds a comprehensive brand profile covering business fundamentals, customer psychology, differentiation, brand voice, proof points, and digital ecosystem. Merges operational brand depth with conversion intelligence. Outputs a structured brand-intelligence-center/ folder that serves as the foundation for all Strategy Labs marketplace plugins.

plugins.name: brand-knowledge-center
plugins.description: Brand Knowledge Center — a step-by-step setup wizard that builds a comprehensive brand profile covering business fundamentals, financials, digital presence, brand identity, audience messaging, and competitive landscape. Generates a structured brand-knowledge-center/ folder that serves as the foundation for all Strategy Labs marketplace plugins.

plugins.name: competitive-landscape
plugins.description: Track competitors, analyze their ad strategies across Meta and Google, map customer journeys on competitor sites, and generate competitive intelligence reports. Provides a complete toolkit for understanding and outmaneuvering the competitive landscape any brand operates in.

plugins.name: content-library
plugins.description: Content Library — the indexed backlog of all approved marketing copy and the searchable catalogue of brand visual assets. Surfaces existing approved copy before new copy is written. Prompts for approval and storage after every copy session. Integrated with brand-asset-manager for asset discovery.

plugins.name: customer-driven-optimizations
plugins.description: Analyze recorded customer phone calls to extract competitive intelligence, identify site optimization opportunities, map customer journeys, and generate a deployable HTML dashboard. Supports both audio files and pre-made transcripts. Integrates with Brand Content OS for brand context. Includes frontend-design skill for production-grade, distinctive dashboard UI.

plugins.name: inbox-command-center
plugins.description: Inbox Command Center — AI communications manager that triages Gmail, Slack, iMessage, and messaging platforms. Auto-categorizes messages, drafts replies in your authentic voice (learned from transcripts, phone calls, sent emails, Slack messages, and A/B calibration), manages calendar conflicts, tracks tasks, creates smart rules with delete/prioritization/folder-based options, delivers scheduled daily briefings and VIP summaries with pre-written drafts, generates monthly inbox reports with full analytics, and sends reminders via dedicated Slack channel, Slack DM, or iMessage. Integrates with Brand Knowledge Center for brand-voice drafting.

plugins.name: jtc-social-media-writer
plugins.description: JTC Social Media Writer — generates Facebook, Instagram, and Google Business posts from job details in JTC's brand voice

plugins.name: lead-list-builder
plugins.description: Lead List Builder — complete lead generation and pipeline management system. Research leads, draft personalized outreach, track status, deploy interactive dashboards, connect CRM/email/calendar/social tools, automate new lead discovery, and manage daily/weekly/monthly workflow with alerts, reviews, and reports. Integrates with Brand Knowledge Center.
